overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a nighttime drive through a neon-lit futuristic city. The player navigates through highways, underpasses, and commercial districts with wet reflective streets and dense holographic billboards.

agents.ego_description: driving steadily along elevated highway with hands on steering wheel, dashboard ornament visible

entered.detail: metal barrier running along left side of elevated road
large blocky industrial building with minimal lighting
tall pole with overhead lighting illuminating the road
illuminated advertising screen on building facade
concrete bridge crossing over the highway ahead
suspended traffic signal showing red light

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on an elevated highway at night, driving past industrial warehouses and under concrete overpasses. The road is wet with rain reflections, and digital billboards begin appearing on the right side as the vehicle approaches an intersection.

scene_state.functional_zone: commercial city street with glass towers

events.description: transitioning from industrial highway to dense commercial district with tall glass buildings
approaching intersection with crosswalk markings and traffic signals

agents.ego_description: navigating through commercial streets, making turns at intersections and passing palm trees

entered.detail: multi-story building with illuminated windows and signage
tall modern building with reflective glass facade
tropical tree lining the street
yellow and white striped pedestrian crossing lines
ground-level retail entrance with glass doors

segments.scene_description: The vehicle descends from the highway into a commercial district featuring modern glass skyscrapers and palm-lined streets. The environment shifts from industrial to urban downtown with prominent neon signage and crosswalks appearing as the vehicle navigates turns.

events.description: entering enclosed underpass with concrete walls and artificial lighting
exiting underpass back into open commercial street with bright neon billboards

agents.ego_description: driving through narrow underpass with colorful green and purple wall lighting, then emerging back to surface

entered.detail: descending ramp leading into underground passage
smooth concrete wall with green accent lighting
vertical concrete surface with colored illumination
green and purple neon strips along tunnel ceiling
ascending ramp leading back to street level
massive billboard displaying advertisements

segments.scene_description: The vehicle enters a concrete underpass with smooth walls illuminated by green and purple lighting fixtures. After driving through the enclosed tunnel, it emerges back to street level where large digital billboards become visible again.

scene_state.functional_zone: neon-lit commercial district with retail storefronts

events.description: emerging from underpass into brightly lit area with pink and purple neon storefronts

agents.ego_description: cruising through vibrant commercial streets lined with palm trees and illuminated storefronts

notable_agents.action: white sedan driving in the opposite direction on the left side of the road

entered.detail: large illuminated sign with pink and red advertising
shop entrance with bright interior lighting and signage
contemporary structure with illuminated windows
vertical illuminated sign on building facade

segments.scene_description: Exiting the underpass reveals a vibrant commercial strip with pink neon billboards and retail storefronts. Palm trees line the wet streets as the vehicle passes modern glass buildings and occasional traffic.

scene_state.functional_zone: busy commercial intersection with outdoor dining

events.description: approaching busy intersection with multiple vehicles including red sports car
making right turn at intersection following the road curve

agents.ego_description: navigating through busy intersections, yielding to other vehicles and following traffic flow

notable_agents.action: red sports car waiting at intersection then accelerating across the intersection

entered.detail: road junction with crosswalks and traffic signals
restaurant with yellow umbrellas and outdoor seating

segments.scene_description: The final segment features navigation through busy intersections with other vehicles present, including a prominent red sports car. The vehicle passes outdoor cafes with yellow umbrellas and continues through the neon-lit commercial core with dense digital signage.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous drive that transitions from a bleak industrial highway into a vibrant, neon-lit urban core. It begins on an elevated road passing concrete overpasses and industrial warehouses, where the wet pavement reflects the first few digital billboards appearing on the horizon. As the vehicle descends from the highway, the environment shifts into a dense commercial district characterized by glass skyscrapers, palm trees, and glowing neon signage. The scene then plunges into a concrete underpass illuminated by rhythmic green and purple lighting before finally emerging back onto the street level beneath a canopy of massive digital displays.

The shot follows a continuous drive from the confines of a dark underpass into the sprawling, neon-drenched heart of a futuristic commercial district. It begins as the vehicle emerges into the open air, revealing a vibrant strip of pink neon billboards and retail storefronts lining wet streets dotted with palm trees. As the camera glides past modern glass buildings, the environment shifts toward a more congested urban core characterized by busy intersections and the presence of other traffic, including a prominent red sports car. The scene then expands to include outdoor cafes with yellow umbrellas before finally pushing deeper into the commercial center amidst a dense canopy of glowing digital signage.
